cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to find the best title for the passage about the London Olympics. The main topic seems to be how London made the Olympics environmentally friendly, right? The first paragraph mentions that London could win a gold medal for hosting the "greenest" Games ever. That's a key point. The passage talks about several green initiatives. For example, cleaning up polluted areas, using recycled materials in construction, green building techniques, waste management with rainwater and recycling, and using public transport to reduce carbon emissions. There's also a mention of the anti-doping results being clean, but that seems like a side note compared to the environmental efforts. Looking at the options: A) How to deal with the anti-doping – This is only a small part of the passage, so probably not the main title.
